name: Lago Spa (Lago Resort)
description: By the sea at Cala en Bosch, the Lago Resort spa offers a thermal circuit — heated pool, jacuzzi, sauna and Turkish bath — and bespoke treatments. Open to outside visitors for a calm day with a Mediterranean feel.

highlights: Thermal circuit: heated pool, jets, jacuzzi, sauna and Turkish bath
Body and facial rituals and treatments, therapeutic massages
A day spa open to outside visitors, by the sea
